productDisplayName: Tantra Kid's Unisex 5 Elements Choco Brown Kidswear
description: CompositionChoco brown round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash careMachine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroideryGet your naughty little one to wear that cheeky smile all the time with this summery orange t-shirt from tantra. While the naughty graphic brings a smile on everyone's face and adds to the twinkle in your little one's eyes, the cotton fabric will keep the young one dry and comfortable at all times.
